headline: Crypto Currents: SEC, CFTC sign MOU for Joint Harmonization Initiative
summary: As bitcoin, ethereum and other cryptocurrencies see major legal, institutional, and technological developments, the financial landscape continues to adapt. headline: How The Nasdaq (NDAQ) Story Is Shifting With AI Themes And Higher Analyst Targets
summary: Nasdaq’s analyst fair value estimate has been nudged higher, from US$107.73 to US$108.53, which is putting fresh attention on how the market is thinking about the stock. Recent research has been broadly constructive, with several bullish analysts lifting targets into a US$113 to US$120 band and one upgrade after the latest investor day, tying higher price targets to execution in financial technology, AI related demand, and the strength of its trading and data platforms. Read on to see how...
